wiki_pages_scope_agent_check.name: wiki_pages_scope_agent_check
wiki_pages_scope_agent_check.value: (scope = 'user' AND agent_id IS NULL) OR (scope = 'agent' AND agent_id IS NOT NULL)

recurring_agent_tasks_next_run_idx.name: recurring_agent_tasks_next_run_idx
recurring_agent_tasks_next_run_idx.where: next_run_at IS NOT NULL AND paused = false AND tombstoned_at IS NULL

recurring_agent_tasks_user_suggested_uni.name: recurring_agent_tasks_user_suggested_unique
recurring_agent_tasks_user_suggested_uni.where: suggested_id IS NOT NULL AND tombstoned_at IS NULL
